# llms.txt
# MottoBiz - AI Business Automation Studio
# Last updated: 2026-04-13
# For more information: https://mottobiz.com

## Overview

MottoBiz is Surat's first AI business automation studio. We help solopreneurs and small businesses in Surat, Gujarat automate their daily operations — WhatsApp follow-ups, social media, lead pipelines — without hiring a team.

## Target Audience

- Solopreneurs in Surat looking to scale without hiring
- Small businesses in Gujarat seeking digital transformation
- Non-technical business owners who want automation without complexity
- Entrepreneurs who prefer Hindi or Gujarati communication

## Core Services

1. **Smart Website Development** - High-converting, SEO-optimized websites
2. **AI Automation** - WhatsApp auto-replies, follow-ups, intelligent workflows
3. **Social Media Automation** - Automated content creation and scheduling
4. **Business Intelligence** - Analytics dashboards and reporting systems
5. **Workflow Automation** - Connect tools, eliminate manual tasks
6. **Lead Pipeline Automation** - Capture, qualify, and convert leads automatically

## Business Model

- Monthly retainer pricing (custom quotes after free audit)
- 5-8 client maximum capacity
- No lock-in contracts
- Optional handover after 12 months
- Hindi and Gujarati language support

## Key Differentiators

- First AI automation studio in Surat
- Built specifically for non-technical owners
- Local Gujarat expertise with global technology
- Limited client roster for quality focus

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://mottobiz.com/
- Pricing: https://mottobiz.com/pricing.md
- Sitemap: https://mottobiz.com/sitemap.xml

## Contact Information

- WhatsApp: +91 74879 57972

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mottobiz

## Languages Supported

- English
- Hindi
- Gujarati
